General.Name: WEBUY GLOBAL LTD. Ordinary Shares
General.Description: Webuy Global Ltd operates as an e-commerce retailor with dual focus on grocery and travel in Singapore, Indonesia, and internationally. It offers a range of products, including food and beverages, fresh produce, lifestyle daily essentials, e-vouchers, miscellaneous daily needs, and personal care items. It also provides solutions for corporate retreats, incentive travel, conferences, exhibitions, and customized group travel programs. The company was founded in 2019 and is headquartered in Singapore.
